description_long: This is a modern, stylized axe with a robust, dark metallic blade featuring angular, aggressive lines and a prominent circular motif at the center. The blade has two main cutting edges, one larger and curved with a pointed tip, and a smaller, secondary edge below, both accented by orange highlights. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of a dark, reinforced material, possibly metal or composite, with textured grip sections and capped ends. The central circular motif on the blade is ribbed and bordered by orange, giving it a high-tech or fantasy appearance. The axe's overall design suggests it is intended for heavy-duty or decorative use, possibly as a prop or for display. The construction appears solid and durable, with no visible fasteners or separable parts.
description: A modern, stylized axe with a dark, angular blade featuring orange highlights and a ribbed circular motif, paired with a straight, textured handle.
description_view_0: The axe is seen edge-on, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the straight handle with capped ends.
description_view_1: The main blade is fully visible, displaying its angular, aggressive shape, orange highlights, and the ribbed circular motif at the center.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the opposite edge, again showing the narrow profile and the alignment of the blade with the handle.
description_view_3: The reverse side of the blade is visible, mirroring the design of view 1 with the same angular blade, orange accents, and central motif.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical handle made of dark composite or metal, with textured grip sections and capped ends; cross-section appears round.
attribute_blade_design: Large, angular blade with two cutting edges (one main, one secondary), a pointed tip, and a ribbed circular motif at the center; accented with orange highlights.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite or molded mounting with no visible fasteners; blade appears integrated with the handle.
